session_summary: Massive single-day build. Went from empty repo to a fully-functional Hebrew-RTL admin app with branded design system, custom dropdown, animated modal, three CRUD entities (zones, apartments, residents), apartment assets (parking + storage), residents with phones-as-subform, and the full View↔Edit toggle pattern across all detail pages.

stack.runtime_target: lobby PC, localhost only — not a server deployment

tables: apartments (id, number UNIQUE, floor, zone_id FK, notes)
residents (id, apartment_id FK CASCADE, first_name, last_name, id_number, po_box, type owner|renter, move_in, move_out, notes)
phones (id, resident_id FK CASCADE, number, label, comment, is_primary)
apartment_assets (id, type parking|storage, floor, number, apartment_id FK SET NULL, notes; UNIQUE(type, floor, number))
schema.evolution_helper: src/lib/db.ts has ensureColumn() — idempotent ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN for adding columns to existing DBs without restart. Used once for phones.comment.
schema.kept_unused_for_now: phones.label (UI dropped, column kept), residents.move_in/move_out (columns kept, not in form yet)

primitives: src/components/ui/Button.tsx — variants: primary (brand red gradient), secondary, ghost, outline, destructive (red outline). Sizes: sm/md/lg/icon/icon-sm. active:scale + focus ring
src/components/ui/Input.tsx — exports inputBase. Prevents Enter from submitting forms by default (submitOnEnter prop opts in).
src/components/ui/Dropdown.tsx — custom <button> + portal-style panel with framer-motion, brand-red highlight, keyboard nav, ESC capture-phase to outrank Modal
shells: src/components/Modal.tsx — portal to body, framer-motion AnimatePresence, backdrop blur, scale-in card, ESC/click-outside, size sm|md|lg
src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx — class-based dark/light, no-flash inline script in layout

screen_pattern: List page → click row → /entity/[id] → ViewMode by default → ערוך button → EditMode with reusable EntityForm → Save/Cancel → back to ViewMode. Implemented for residents, apartments. Zones uses inline modal-edit (single field, lighter pattern).

routes./: Dashboard — live counts (apartments, active residents, zones)
routes./zones: List + add modal + per-row pencil edit modal
routes./apartments: List + add modal (lg, includes parking/storage subforms)
routes./apartments/[id]: View/Edit toggle. View shows residents, parking, storage, notes
routes./renters/[id]: View/Edit toggle. View shows phones (primary marked with red star), info, notes

decisions_logged_to_memory: memory/project_overview.md — local-first lobby PC, single-building per install
memory/project_schema_decisions.md — flat residents, no buildings/floors tables, zones lookup
memory/project_business_context.md — outsourced security, app is free value-add, Moti's credit on the line
memory/project_screen_pattern.md (new this session) — the View/Edit toggle convention
current_focus: Session ended on a high note. All three CRUD trees are working end-to-end. Tomorrow starts a new session.
next_session_plan: 1. Live search on /renters — debounced input, server-side query, render filtered results without full page reload (URL state for sharability)
2. Keys table + form — lobby logs key handovers (resident, key #, given_at, returned_at?, notes)
3. Packages table + form — lobby logs incoming packages (resident, courier, received_at, picked_up_at, notes)
Once that ships: Excel import for residents (the original goal — bulk-load the existing list)
open_questions_for_next_session: Search scope — just residents or also search apartments + zones from one bar?
Keys/packages — do they belong on the resident detail page (history of their keys/packages), a top-level page, or both?
When residents move out, do we keep the row with move_out filled, or archive?
git_state: All committed and pushed as of last commit. Latest commit: feat: apartments + residents CRUD with detail/edit toggle and phones (094f207). Apartment assets work IS NOT YET COMMITTED — uncommitted changes: AssetsFields, ApartmentForm/View/Detail updates, actions parse helpers, schema.
